name: full index covers all events
then: entries where type='event' is approximately 993; fts_rows == entries

name: spec corpus isolation
then: spec index counts and a fixed spec query's BM25 ranking are byte-identical to baseline

name: ranked event recall
given: an event file containing a known RCA keyword (e.g. 'phantom account 529')
then: that event is in the top results with a <mark> snippet; latency < 50ms

name: date-range filter
then: only events whose filename date is within range are returned

name: undated filename degrades gracefully
given: an event file whose name has no parseable date
then: rebuild completes; that entry has created=null and is still full-text searchable

name: routing rule is small
when: the three-tier routing rule is counted
then: the rule block is < 25 lines and contains no knowledge bodies

name: migration gate blocks premature empty
given: at least one migrated MEMORY.md item not yet verified findable

name: unified retired to stub
then: file is < 5 lines pointing at event_search; prior content recoverable from git
